description: Gate 1 DoD tracker — all open decisions requiring Ken confirmation. Retrospective populated 2026-05-08 to capture all pre-today gaps. Checked at sprint planning and sprint review.

decisions.decision: Holocron at P4 FSI: Hybrid (Notion internal + self-hosted client KB) vs Notion-restrictions-only
decisions.recommended: Hybrid — Notion for AInchors internal, self-hosted KB for FSI client environments

decisions.decision: The Citadel build approach: Notion-based P2 / custom build P4 (recommended) vs direct custom build from P2
decisions.recommended: Notion-based v0 for first 2-3 SME clients Q3 2026, custom build Q3-Q4 for P4-ready version
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before first client onboarded

decisions.decision: Holonet P2 scope: REST/webhooks only (recommended) vs include DB connectors from P2
decisions.recommended: REST/webhooks only for P2. DB connectors = P3 commercial tier or P4.
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before API build begins

decisions.decision: Warden deployment model: AInchors-managed P2 (recommended) vs per-tenant Warden from P2
decisions.recommended: AInchors-managed single Warden for P2. Per-tenant Warden = P4 FSI only.

decisions.decision: Postgres deployment on OC1: standalone Homebrew vs Docker
decisions.recommended: Standalone Homebrew for P1/dev. Docker for P2 production.
decisions.urgency: Before any Postgres schema build begins

decisions.decision: Redis in P1: add now for P2-readiness vs defer to P2 and use Postgres session tables only
decisions.recommended: Defer Redis to P2. Use Postgres session tables for P1 short-term memory.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T2 session memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T2 session memory build begins

decisions.decision: Initial knowledge base ingestion priority — which documents to ingest first in Month 2
decisions.recommended: AInchors strategy docs, agent SOUL.md/RULES.md, Agile framework, EA docs. Then client-facing docs.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T4 Semantic Memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T4 RAG pipeline build begins

decisions.decision: PII scanner tool: spaCy (lighter, Python-native) vs Presidio (enterprise-grade, Microsoft)
decisions.recommended: Presidio — APRA CPG 234 requires enterprise-grade PII detection for P2+ client workloads
decisions.urgency: P2 gate — before client data ingestion

decisions.decision: Formal audit log retention policy for P1: set now (recommended: indefinite) vs defer
decisions.recommended: Set now: indefinite retention for P1. Review at P2 for regulated data retention schedules.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / TKT-0075 Audit Log Architecture
decisions.urgency: Before T3 episodic log build begins

decisions.decision: agent_shared_state conflict handling: automatic retry on optimistic lock conflict vs last-write-wins with history preserved
decisions.recommended: Automatic retry (3x) on optimistic lock conflict. Last-write-wins only as final fallback with history entry.
decisions.blockedItem: TKT-0104 / DRAFT-001 / T5 Shared Memory build
decisions.urgency: Before T5 shared state build begins

decisions.decision: Portfolio artefacts primary audience: Ken job search (CIO/CTO credential) vs AInchors client-facing sales collateral
decisions.recommended: Both — dual-purpose. Ken job search framing for P1. Client-facing from P2.

decisions.decision: Lando BPM agent spec (Business_Process_Specialist_Agent_v1.md) — review against new Tier 3 governance model before formal acceptance
decisions.recommended: Review spec, add Tier 3 SOP and domain boundary section (per TKT-0105 Model3-Policy), then accept.

decisions.decision: Warden monitoring scope: enrol specialist agents (Atlas, Thrawn, Lando, Mon Mothma, Spark) in model-policy.json OR document explicit exclusion permanently
decisions.recommended: Explicit exclusion documented in model-policy.json for Tier 3 agents (no model drift risk — they use Sonnet/Haiku by design). Krennic to be added when built.

decisions.decision: Aria shared context files — verify context-for-aria.md, yoda-daily-brief.md, aria-daily-brief.md, relay-to-ken.json are present and active
decisions.recommended: Run verification check. If any missing, recreate. This is CHG-P6 from TKT-0103.

decisions.decision: Guardrail integration: R4/R5 (Aria NPS/pattern capture), C1-C5 (Ahsoka), A1-A4 (Atlas), G1-G2/W1-W2 (Sanctum/Warden) — all missing or unverified
decisions.recommended: Integrate R4/R5 into ARIA_RULES.md, verify/integrate C1-C5 into Ahsoka's rules, verify A1-A4 in Atlas SOUL.md, verify G1-G2/W1-W2. Track per TKT-0102.
decisions.urgency: Sprint 2 — strategy docs reference these as live but they are not
